problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area — specifically Transcranial magnetic stimulation — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
